summary: A single-story bunker-like structure with a flat roof featuring a dark wood/nether brick trim band. The building has a rectangular footprint with stone brick walls, multiple small windows arranged in a row on the front facade, and sits on a raised gravel foundation. The roof appears to be a flat design with a recessed interior space visible from above.

shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry along the long axis

materials.name: nether_brick
materials.role: roof trim band and decorative accent

elements: windows (5 small rectangular windows in front row)
nether brick trim band around roof perimeter
rebuild_hints: Build rectangular stone brick walls approximately 14 blocks wide by 8 blocks deep
Construct a raised gravel foundation platform extending 1-2 blocks beyond the walls on all sides
Create a flat roof using stone slabs with a nether brick trim band running around the perimeter
Install 5 small rectangular windows (approximately 2x2 blocks each) evenly spaced across the front facade
Leave a recessed interior space visible from the roof (approximately 1 block deep inset from edges)
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the length of the building
No visible door entrance suggests possible underground access or sealed structure
uncertainties: Exact window dimensions and spacing - appears to be 2x2 blocks but could vary
Interior layout and height of interior space - not visible in images
Presence of entrance door - not visible from any angle shown
Exact depth dimension - estimated from perspective but could be 7-9 blocks
Roof interior material composition - appears hollow but exact construction unknown
Whether structure extends below ground level - foundation depth unclear
